_comment: Android test app — ProjectConfig template demonstrating Phase E's runtime tier detection. activeTier="auto" tells GameRunner::runAndroid to call AndroidTierDetect::detectAndroidTier() and substitute the result before constructing EngineDesc. The same substitution fires when activeTier is empty. Loaded at runtime via AndroidFileSystem -> ProjectConfig::loadFromString (see engine/game/GameRunner.cpp's runAndroid(configPath) overload, wired from engine/platform/android/AndroidApp.cpp).
name: Sama Android Test
